name: 06-22-pkcs-m3b-mixed-language-query-planner
title: brainstorm: PKCS M3B mixed-language query planner
description: Plan M3B query planning and multi-pass lexical retrieval for mixed-language queries before implementing retrieval behavior changes.
creator: tantless
notes: M3B planning started. M3A1 baseline shows Chinese natural no-marker queries produce 6/6 empty results against mostly English corpus content, while English title-style smoke queries hit expected sources. Recommended M3B MVP is deterministic query planning plus multi-pass lexical retrieval/fusion, with semantic/vector search deferred.

meta.open_question: Whether M3B MVP should only implement deterministic lexical planning, or also reserve a disabled translation pass adapter.
